name: jaspr-ribbon-toolbar-lsp
description: Language server for .ribbon JSON bundles (jaspr-ribbon-toolbar): validation, autocomplete for itemType/iconKey, hover docs.

jasprRibbonLsp.dartPath.description: Path to the Dart executable used to launch the server.

jasprRibbonLsp.serverPath.description: Absolute path to packages/jaspr_ribbon_lsp/bin/jaspr_ribbon_lsp.dart. Leave empty to use the bundled default.
